mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movie_public (movie_name, director, year, poster_url, genre, region, tmdb_id) VALUES (#{movieName}, #{director}, #{year}, #{posterUrl}, #{genre}, #{region}, #{tmdbId})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, m.movie_name, m.director, m.year, m.poster_url, m.genre, m.region FROM movie_collection c JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, m.movie_name, m.director, m.year, m.poster_url, m.genre, m.region FROM movie_collection c JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE c.collection_id = #{collectionId}
SELECT * FROM movie_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND movie_id = #{movieId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movie_collection (user_id, movie_id, personal_rating, watch_status, private_review) VALUES (#{userId}, #{movieId}, #{personalRating}, #{watchStatus}, #{privateReview})
mapper.update: UPDATE movie_collection SET personal_rating = #{personalRating}, watch_status = #{watchStatus}, private_review = #{privateReview}, update_time = NOW() WHERE collection_id = #{collectionId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.movie_id as movieId, m.tmdb_id as tmdbId, m.movie_name as movieName, m.director, m.year, m.poster_url as posterUrl, m.genre, m.region, m.avg_rating as avgRating, m.rating_count as ratingCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_comment c WHERE c.movie_id = m.movie_id) as commentCount FROM movie_public m WHERE m.avg_rating IS NOT NULL AND m.avg_rating > 0 ORDER BY m.avg_rating DESC, m.rating_count DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT m.movie_id as movieId, m.tmdb_id as tmdbId, m.movie_name as movieName, m.director, m.year, m.poster_url as posterUrl, m.genre, m.region, m.avg_rating as avgRating, m.rating_count as ratingCount, COUNT(c.comment_id) as commentCount FROM movie_public m LEFT JOIN movie_comment c ON m.movie_id = c.movie_id GROUP BY m.movie_id HAVING commentCount > 0 ORDER BY commentCount DESC, m.avg_rating DESC LIMIT 50
